mapper.select: SELECT id, title, content, is_active, created_at, updated_at FROM notice ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT id, title, content, is_active, created_at, updated_at FROM notice WHERE is_active = true ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notice (title, content, is_active, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{isActive}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE notice SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, is_active = #{isActive}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notice WHERE is_active = true
